input.background: Say whether each of the boldface numbers is a parameter or a statistic.
input.question: Cost of antihypertensive medication. Data from 10 online pharmacies reveal that the average cost of a 1-month supply of a particular medication is $31.20 with standard deviation $7.75. Data from 10 community pharmacies shows an average cost of $33.18 with standard deviation $7.88.

output.answer: All are statistics. (These statistics will be used to infer costs at online and community pharmacies, respectively.)

online_pharmacies_average_cost.description: Average cost of a 1-month supply of medication from online pharmacies.

online_pharmacies_standard_deviation.description: Standard deviation of the cost from online pharmacies.

community_pharmacies_average_cost.description: Average cost of a 1-month supply of medication from community pharmacies.

community_pharmacies_standard_deviation.description: Standard deviation of the cost from community pharmacies.
